subcodes.first_line: O handmaids of the Lord! The spiritual assemblage that ye established in that illumined city is most propitious….
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن محفل رحمانی که در آن مدینه نورانی تاسیس نمودید بسیار بجا و مجری
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
